security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data: blob:; font-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost ws://localhost:1420; frame-src 'self'

bundle.shortDescription: View Outlook PST files without Outlook
bundle.longDescription: PSTInsight is a fast, modern viewer for Microsoft Outlook PST archives. Browse folders, read messages, manage attachments, and export to EML, TXT, or MSG — no Outlook or MAPI required.
